No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly mentions M&A in the 'biomedical industry' (生醫產業), which can indirectly support R&D for medicines and health outcomes (Target 3.b).
evidence: 在政府大力推動的生醫產業，併購更是蔚為風氣

Quality Education.reason: As a university seminar, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to equip students with 'Employability skills' (Target 4.4) relevant to market practice.
evidence: 使學生能更貼近市場與實務
就業知能—別於傳統之多元就業知能

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course emphasizes M&A as a strategy for corporate growth, competitiveness, and high-value creation in high-tech industries, promoting economic productivity and innovation (Targets 8.1, 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 併購成為企業成長與發展的重要策略之一
強化企業競爭能力與掌握競爭優勢
增加競爭力已經成為經營常態

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core focus is on M&A and intellectual property in high-tech industries to drive innovation, acquire technology, and enhance technological capabilities, directly aligning with SDG 9 (Targets 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: 智慧財產權與併購結合的綜效
Cisco如何運用併購取得所需之智 財與成長

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course covers legal frameworks, due diligence, litigation risks, and ethical issues like insider trading in M&A, directly promoting the rule of law and strengthening institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's focus on 'cross-border M&A' and international cases implies partnerships for technology and knowledge sharing, aligning with strengthening global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.17).
